title: Jonathan Allen | BAL Immigration Law
content:
Jonathan is an Associate in BAL’s Dallas office. He advises clients on a wide array of employment-based immigration matters, including immigrant and nonimmigrant visas, with a focus on H-1B, L-1, I-140 and employment-based adjustment of status. Before joining BAL, Jonathan practiced at a boutique immigration law firm in the Philadelphia area. He advised a range of clients, from multinational corporations, global health services and higher education institutions to researchers, students and professional athletes. In addition to his employment-based knowledge, Jonathan has prior experience with family-based immigration visas, representing families in complex immigration matters. Jonathan is a current member of the American Immigration Lawyers Association (AILA) and previously served as an AILA chapter liaison to U.S. Customs and Border Protection.
Temple University Beasley School of Law, J.D. Morehouse College, B.A.
English, Spanish (Conversational)
Pennsylvania State Bar
